misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: advertisements for Southern Pacific Lines winter excursion fares, PEP '88' gasoline, Mountaineer overalls, Long Royal bread, various L.D.S. garment manufacturers (Utah Woolen Mills, Barton & Co., Cutler), Beneficial Life Insurance, Salt Lake Visiting Nursing Service, Browning Drake Radio, and Clover Leaf dairy products. Also includes two brief organizational messages from 'The Presidency and General Board Relief Society' - one about Temple Work achievements in 1929 and another with New Year greetings and thanks to Relief Society sisters. These messages are too brief and administrative in nature to constitute standalone articles.
